name: The Tivoli
notes: Iconic 1500-capacity theatre venue; hosts touring and local acts across all genres. One of Brisbane's most established live music institutions.

name: Fortitude Music Hall
notes: 3000-capacity ballroom-style venue; Australia's largest of its type. Five bars. Houses The Outpost (300-cap) as a smaller inner venue. Major touring acts.

name: The Outpost
notes: 300-capacity room inside Fortitude Music Hall; dedicated to local performers. Late-night 70s post-punk aesthetic.

name: The Triffid
notes: Converted WWII aircraft hangar; 800-capacity. Owned by Powderfinger bassist John Collins. Acoustic Wednesdays and Sunday beer garden sessions free. Strong focus on emerging bands.

name: Black Bear Lodge
notes: Intimate hole-in-the-wall venue at 322 Brunswick St. EP sets, intimate touring gigs, Sunday Service (free entry). DJ sets, trivia, '90s dance parties.

name: Brooklyn Standard
notes: Eagle Lane basement bar. Live music 6 nights a week (jazz, soul, funk, blues, rockabilly). Award-winning venue: Best Live Music Venue in Australia 2015, 2019, 2021. Jam nights on Wednesdays.

name: The Brightside
notes: 27 Warner St; former church. Indie, rock, hardcore, alternative. Dog-friendly beer garden. Hosts Access All Areas unsigned band competition. Regular gig nights.

name: Crowbar Brisbane
notes: 711 Ann St; took over from The Zoo (closed 2024). Rock and metal focus. Local and international artists. Consistently full calendar.

name: Greaser
notes: 259A Brunswick St basement bar. Open Wed–Sat. Emerging indie and rock bands. Graffiti-covered, exposed brick. Many free gigs. American food menu.

name: Suzie Wong's Good Time Bar
notes: 678 Ann St. Hawaiian dive bar. Live music 4 nights/week plus hospitality nights Sundays. Check Facebook for lineup.

name: The Sound Garden
notes: 312–318 Brunswick St. Two-floor bar/restaurant; 700 capacity. Live music stage on ground floor with local artists on weekends.

name: Lefty's Old Time Music Hall
notes: 15 Caxton St. Country, honky-tonk, rockabilly. Live music Thu–Sat. American food menu. Secret Mermaid Bar inside. Trading hours: Fri–Sat 5pm–2am.

name: The Bearded Lady
notes: 138 Boundary St. Live music Thu–Sun. Gypsy Jazz Sundays ($10 door). Free shows Wednesdays in front bar. BYO food. Local and touring acts.

name: It's Still A Secret
notes: 48 Montague Rd. 130-year-old heritage building. Dedicated band room. Wine bar vibes. Local and original acts.

name: The Princess Theatre
notes: 8 Annerley Rd. Heritage-listed 1888 theatre. Reopened 2021 by Tivoli owners. Indie acts, theatre, cabaret, circus. Four bars.

name: Irish Murphy's
notes: Corner George St and Elizabeth St. Live music 7 days/week. Brisbane's most authentic Irish pub. Cover bands, soloists, and Irish entertainers. Gig guide on website.

name: Felons Brewing Co. / Barrel Hall
notes: 5 Boundary St (Story Bridge). Barrel Hall experimental space blending live music and beer. Regular ticketed gigs (funk, jazz, soul, rock, originals). Outdoor lawn also hosts performances.

name: The Junk Bar
notes: Neighbourhood bar. Open mic Thursdays. Curated cocktails. Low-key live music nights. Local artists.

name: Brisbane Jazz Club
notes: Not-for-profit jazz club. Regular jazz performances. School/college bands as well as established artists. All-ages friendly.

name: Brisbane Powerhouse
notes: Former power station turned multi-arts hub. Live music, theatre, festivals. Sunday afternoon sessions. Bars and restaurants onsite.

name: Pig 'n' Whistle Riverside
notes: Eagle St. British-themed pub. Regular live bands booked on weekends. Home of the British in Brisbane.

name: Carindale Hotel
notes: Live music every Friday from 4pm–7pm. Local talent sessions.

name: Mates Restaurant and Bar
notes: Edith St, Wynnum. Live acoustic music Fri–Sat evenings 6:30pm–8:30pm. Local artists.

name: Geebung RSL
notes: Free live entertainment Fri–Sun on bridge (Level One) and Sunday afternoons in The Cove. Guitar vocalists and soloists. Regular weekly schedule.

name: Kedron-Wavell Services Club
notes: Brisbane's award-winning services club. Regular live music and entertainment program. 15 minutes north of CBD in Chermside precinct.

name: Easts Leagues Club
notes: Regular live music schedule in The Lounge. Fri–Sun performances. Mix of solo and band acts.

name: Wynnum Manly Leagues Club
notes: Free live entertainment Fri–Sun. Largest entertainment venue in Brisbane's southeastern corridor. Regular roster of acts.

name: Broncos Leagues Club
notes: Regular lineup of live performers and bands. Check What's On calendar. Ticketed and free events.

name: Miami Marketta
notes: 23 Hillcrest Parade. Converted mechanics warehouse/laneway. Open Wed, Fri, Sat 5pm–10pm. Mix of free and ticketed events. Cargo Stage for homegrown artists. Major national touring acts.

name: Coolangatta Hotel
notes: Beachfront pub. Free live music almost nightly. Covers, tributes, DJs. Late-night 18+ from 10pm. Popular NYE venue. One of GC's most active free music pubs.

name: SoundLounge (at Currumbin RSL)
notes: 165 Duringan St. Gold Coast's premier original music venue; 300–670 cap. Winner 'Best Live Music Venue Gold Coast' 2015. Fri–Sun. Ticketed shows ~$40–$80 via Oztix/Humanitix.

name: Currumbin RSL (main venue)
notes: 23+ hours of free live music every Fri, Sat, Sun. Creekside setting. Alley's Restaurant and The Deck dining. Courtesy bus Wed–Sun. Phone: 07 5534 7999.

name: Vinnies Dive Bar
notes: Punk, hardcore, indie. Local and touring acts. Backyard beer garden. One of GC's best for alternative/indie music.

name: Mo's Desert Clubhouse
notes: 6/36 Central Drive. Live music venue and creative hub. The Warehouse (indoor events space). El Ranchero bar. Indie, heavy, rock. Touring and local acts.

name: Den Devine Restaurant & Music Hall
notes: Soulful live music hall. Jazz, blues, funk. Intimate 150-cap space. GCMA finalist acoustics. Late-night dining. Open mic Tuesday nights.

name: Burleigh Town Tavern
notes: Family-friendly beachside pub since 1981. Free live music Fri–Sat 8pm (rock/pop covers), Sunday arvo acoustic sessions. Regular touring acts.

name: The Wallaby Hotel
notes: Intimate originals venue. Local and touring Australian artists (Alex Lloyd, Mick Thomas, Wendy Matthews). Tribute acts and originals.

name: Finn McCool's Irish Pub
notes: Free live music Fri/Sat/Sun + Irish Thursdays. Regular schedule of cover acts and Irish entertainers.

name: CSi Club Southport
notes: 154A Scarborough St. Free live music every Fri and Sat night, Sundays and specials. Family-focused with bistro and gaming. Party bands and cover acts.

name: Southport RSL Club
notes: 36 Scarborough St. National and international touring acts. Free parking. Bistro 36 dining. Entertainment programs across genres.

name: Nerang RSL
notes: 69 Nerang St. Local and national entertainers Thu–Sun. Renovated venue. 4211 café open 7 days. Art bars, TAB, restaurant.

name: The Lawn at The Star Gold Coast
notes: Garden Kitchen & Bar at The Star. Open-air free acoustic acts and DJs. Fri–Sat from 5pm, Sun from 3pm. Local and international performers.

name: Surfers Paradise Beer Garden
notes: Next to Cavill Ave. 'Home of the finest live music on the Coast'. Authentic rock focus. Regular live bands.

name: Hope Island Tavern
notes: Free live music in Beer Garden from 5pm Fridays. Free BBQ from 3pm. Acoustic sets.

name: The Grand Hotel Labrador
notes: Regular live music, primarily cover bands. Lively atmosphere with dancing crowd.

name: Robina Pavilion
notes: Free live music Fri/Sat/Sun. Cover bands and party acts.

name: Palm Beach Hotel
notes: Free live music on weekends. Regular roster of cover bands.

name: Runaway Bay Tavern
notes: Free live music Fri/Sat/Sun. Regular entertainment schedule.

name: D'Arcy Arms
notes: Regular free acoustic sessions. Irish/British pub style.

name: Jacobs Well Bayside Tavern
notes: Country pub feel. Lots of live music. Massive outdoor area across from the water. North Gold Coast area.

name: Solbar
notes: 19 Ocean St. Sunshine Coast's premier live music venue. Front bar acoustic sessions Tue–Sun. Band room with touring acts and local bands. Staff are accomplished musicians. All-ages shows available.

name: The Station SC
notes: 8 The Avenue. Converted shipping container venue with skate ramp. Major touring acts (JET, Dune Rats, PNAU, Sheppard). Co-run by record producer Alex Henriksson. Large outdoor precinct.

name: Kings Beach Tavern
notes: Award-winning beachside tavern. Winner Best Regional Venue at Queensland Music Awards. Major touring acts (Mel C, The Rubens). Regular entertainment program.

name: Norton Music Factory
notes: Two-stage precinct; 400-person capacity. Boutique festival events. Touring acts (Ben Lee, Boom Crash Opera, James Reyne). All profit goes to local charities. Raised $40,000+ for charity.

name: Sandstone Point Hotel
notes: Bribie Island area. Australia's Best Entertainment Venue award winner. Live local music on waterfront grass Sat and Sun from midday. Nightclub Fri–Sat nights. Major concerts year-round (The Beach Boys, Jimmy Barnes, Joan Jett). Tickets via Ticketmaster/Oztix.

name: Blackflag Brewing
notes: Beachside brewery. Two-stage precinct; 400 capacity. Surf-punk, rock, indie. Boutique festival events including The Big Weekend. Touring acts.

name: Imperial Hotel Eumundi
notes: Comiskey Group venue. Major touring acts (The Beautiful Girls, Ben Lee, The Whitlams). Live music Thu–Sun. Home to Eumundi Brewery. Band room recently refurbished.

name: Villa Noosa Hotel
notes: Regular live music program. Notable acts (Grinspoon, Dellacoma, Shihad, Dune Rats). Good pub food.

name: Coolum Beach Hotel
notes: Regular live music. Local Sunshine Coast acts. It Starts at Home Music Festival hosted here. Regular sessions.

name: The Presynct
notes: 100-person steam-punk inspired vintage cocktail lounge. Eclectic genres (EDM, drum and bass, jazz, heavy metal). Run by mother-daughter duo. Part of growing Nambour original music scene.

name: Black Box Theatre @ The Old Ambo
notes: Purpose-built 100-capacity air-conditioned venue. Hardcore, punk, rock focus. International acts (Dark Thoughts USA, Peter and the Test Tube Babies UK). Grassroots promoters.

name: Nambour RSL Club
notes: Passion for live and free music with local and touring acts. Intimate bars. Gateway to Sunshine Coast Hinterland towns.

name: Club Kawana
notes: Sunshine Coast's Favourite Club. Weekly live entertainment Fri–Sat. Local Sunshine Coast soloists, duos, and bands as well as interstate acts. Bowling club facilities.

name: Maroochy RSL
notes: Regular dance bands performing evenings. Popular with dancers. Book for dinner. Sunshine Coast hinterland gateway club.

name: Club Maroochy (Sunshine Coast Bowls Club)
notes: Live music every Friday night from 6:30pm. Full room of pokies. Bowls club facilities.

name: Moffat Beach Brewing Co.
notes: Caloundra area. Live music Fri–Sun. Craft brewery setting. Local acoustic and band acts.

name: Land & Sea Brewery
notes: Craft beer meets coastal tunes. Local artists and visiting bands every Saturday. Relaxed brewery setting.

name: Boiling Pot Brewing Co.
notes: Live music Fridays and Sundays. Craft brewery with regular entertainment.

name: Banana Bender Pub
notes: Live music and comedy events. Regular entertainment schedule. Pub classics menu. Check website for event calendar.

name: The Dock Mooloolaba
notes: Marina location. Local acoustic artists, live bands, sunset singalongs Thu–Sun. Unbeatable atmosphere.

name: Pier 33 Mooloolaba
notes: Waterfront dining. Live piano Thu and Sun; afternoon live music Sat; Friday evening entertainment. Views over Mooloolaba marina.

name: Finbar's Lounge Bar
notes: 12 Bicentenary Ln. Live music every weekend. Woodfired pizza Thu–Sun. 12 beers on tap. Family-friendly. Hinterland hidden gem.

name: Montville Pub (Cafe Bar Grill)
notes: Main St, Montville. Live music Friday nights and Sat/Sun afternoons. Tudor-style building with beer garden. Phone: 07 5478 5535.

name: Joe's Waterhole Hotel
notes: 85 Memorial Drive, Eumundi. Regular live music events. Part of Sunshine Coast live music scene.

name: Beerwah Hotel
notes: 53 Beerwah Parade. Regular live music events listed on Eventfinda.

name: Bone Idol Brewery
notes: Live music Thu–Sun. Multiple sessions daily on weekends. Open mic nights. Local and touring acts across rock, indie, country. Craft beer, food, darts/shuffleboard.

name: Irish Club Hotel Toowoomba
notes: More entertainment venue than just a pub. Fri–Sat 8pm–midnight; Sun 6pm–10pm. Regular weekly covers acts, original acts, tribute bands, jazz sessions. Open mic Thursdays.

name: Cork & Lever
notes: Wine bar. Live music Thursday nights (7pm–9pm). Excellent atmosphere. Tripadvisor highly rated.

name: Southern Hotel Toowoomba
notes: Regular live music Fri–Sun. Various local solo artists and bands.

name: Mouse Proof Brewery
notes: Open mic events (Cowboy Craig's Open Mic). Craft brewery setting. Fri and weekend sessions.

name: Fitzy's Toowoomba (Tapestry Bar)
notes: Tapestry Bar inside Fitzy's. Regular Thu–Sun live music. Country, rock, covers. Busy entertainment calendar.

name: City Golf Club Toowoomba
notes: Regular Fri–Sat live bands (8pm–11:30pm). Cover bands and local acts.

name: The Tatts Hotel Toowoomba
notes: Regular Saturday night entertainment including covers and retro nights.

name: Flaming Knights Hotel (Drayton)
notes: Drayton area of Toowoomba. Saturday evening live music. Local acts.

name: Banshees Bar & Artspace
notes: Brisbane St, Ipswich. Open mic Wednesdays 7pm; karaoke Thursdays 8pm; gig nights Fri–Sat; various Sundays. Consistently the most active live music venue in Ipswich. Check Facebook for schedule.

name: Stony Creek Brewing (formerly Pumpyard / 4 Hearts Brewing)
notes: 88 Limestone St. Heritage-listed building. Live music most Fri, Sat, Sun in the laneway. Dog and family friendly. Award-winning burgers. Book via nowbookit.

name: Brothers Leagues Club Ipswich
notes: Regular Saturday entertainment in The Lounge (5:30pm). Solo acoustic acts and bands. Free entry.

name: Club Services Ipswich (CSI)
notes: Free live music every Friday and Saturday night. Very active entertainment program.

name: Jets Leagues Club
notes: Free live music most weekends. Regular entertainment program.

name: The Metropole Hotel Ipswich
notes: Regular live music including Sunday sessions. No pokies. Highly recommended by locals.

name: The Rusty Nail
notes: 44 Ipswich City Mall. Live music from local artists Sundays 3:30pm–7:30pm. Tapas menu.

name: Beenleigh Tavern
notes: Live music every Fri, Sat, Sun night. Logan's best live music destination. Diverse schedule from emerging local bands to touring acts. Also Thu and DJ nights.

name: Diggers Services Club Logan
notes: Live entertainment every Friday night. Logan musicians. Also Sat entertainment. Six days of bingo. Crystal Palace function room for 500 guests.

name: Greenbank Services Club
notes: 54 Anzac Ave. Free live entertainment Fri–Sun. 'Friday Night Live' events. Weekend entertainment lineup of local and touring bands/soloists.

name: River Road Tavern
notes: Logan City. Live music in beer garden. Local and touring bands. Sports bar. Family-friendly bistro.

name: Redcliffe RSL
notes: Free live entertainment daily in Diggers Bar and The Point. Daytime sessions Mon–Sun 11am–3pm. Evening sessions Fri–Sat 6pm–10pm and Sat 7pm–11pm. Large weekly program of solo guitar vocalists.

name: Sandstone Point Hotel
notes: Bribie Island/Moreton Bay area. Award-winning entertainment venue. Major concert events. Live local music waterfront grass Sat–Sun from midday. Nightclub Fri–Sat. Contact: 07 3475 3001.

name: Full Moon Hotel
notes: Highly rated on OpenTable. Regular live music. Popular Moreton Bay / Sandgate venue.

name: Narangba Valley Tavern
notes: Regular DJ Friday nights. Live entertainment program. 250-seat restaurant. North of Brisbane in Moreton Bay region.

name: Sports Central Caboolture
notes: Corner Hasking St and Beerburrum Rd. Live music in regular entertainment schedule. Also trivia, bingo, sport.

name: Jumping Goats Bar
notes: Father-daughter run local bar. Musical evenings regularly. BYO food from adjacent outlets. Highly rated on TripAdvisor. Good selection of local beers and wines.

name: Redland Bay Hotel
notes: Views over Moreton Bay. Casual seafood dining. A la carte available. Live music program.

name: Era Bar Redcliffe
notes: Level 1 Comino's Arcade, 133 Redcliffe Parade. Live music on weekends. Relaxed venue for beer lovers.

name: Beenleigh RSL & Golf Club
notes: Regular entertainment program. RSL club with golf facilities. Live music and entertainment events.

name: Twin Towns Clubs & Resort
notes: Corner Griffith St and Wharf St, Tweed Heads (GC border). World-class entertainment. Regular national and international touring acts. Multiple bars including 1st On Wharf sports bar. One of Australia's most awarded services clubs.

name: Surfers RSL (Diggers and Sports Club)
notes: Level 1, 9 Beach Rd. Live music five days/week. Extensive cocktail selection. Modern reinvention of historic Surfers Paradise club.

name: Riverstage
notes: City Botanic Gardens. Outdoor amphitheatre; 9500 capacity. Major festival and concert venue. Host of Lord Mayor's Christmas Carols. Annual music events.

name: Elsewhere Bar
notes: Underground electronic music club. Techno, house, bass. 300+ cap. Funktion-One sound. Industrial vibes. Late closes. Tickets via elsewherebar.com.au or Tixel.

name: The Avenue
notes: 3-15 Orchid Ave. Open 7 days. Live bands, comedy, drag, DJs. Regular covers and touring acts. Heart of Surfers Paradise nightlife.
